query: 未确认的新通知偏好应该如何处理？

memories.content: 旧偏好：通知走 Telegram
候选新偏好：通知可能改走 QQ Bot，confirmed_by_user=False，暂不删除旧值

notes: Contradiction case for candidate updates: retrieval should surface the new candidate without assuming deletion of the old memory.

query: GitHub 在 deep-memory 协作中承担什么角色？

memories.content: GitHub Issues/PR 用作开源社区协作 source of truth；Hermes Kanban 用作 agent 执行审计层
Teambition 用作团队项目管理 source of truth

notes: Organization/system role case with a distractor source-of-truth system.

query: deep-memory 为什么强调可检查和可修正？

memories.content: deep-memory 强调 local SQLite、source trail、conflict status，让用户能检查和修正记忆

notes: Project governance fact: tests whether retrieval finds inspectability and provenance claims.

query: 代码变更完成后 reviewer 要检查什么？

memories.content: reviewer 需要检查代码变更、测试证据和 review-required handoff，再决定是否 unblock

notes: Person/role case for review-gated Kanban workflow.
